events.title: MAC at the Library Reception
events.description: Join us on Thursday night, June 11, 2026 starting at 5 PM to close out the library with All that JAZZ & ART Reception! There will be light food and drink (must be over 21 for wine). MAC at the Library is a collaboration between MAC and the Media-Upper Providence Free Library. events.title: Wawa Welcome America 2026
events.description: Philadelphia's signature multi-day free festival of concerts, block parties, and fireworks running through Independence Day on the Benjamin Franklin Parkway.
events.venue: Benjamin Franklin Parkway and venues citywide

events.title: End of Day Parade with West Powelton Steppers and Band
events.description: The West Powelton Steppers and Band will lead the way for our End of the Day Parade for one last celebration to end our day! The Museum’s Lower Level will close at 4 PM.

events.title: Philly Fair 250 - Day 1
events.description: Free family fair in the Centennial District with culture, cuisine, music, food trucks, performances, trapeze, and hot air balloon rides, part of Wawa Welcome America America250.

events.title: Manayunk Arts Festival
